patterns.title: Single Primary Action Per Region
patterns.description: Each major surface region should have at most one visually dominant primary action.

patterns.title: Explicit State Coverage
patterns.description: Loading, empty, error, and success states are declared where relevant.

patterns.title: Progressive Disclosure
patterns.description: Advanced options remain accessible without overwhelming the default path.

patterns.title: Operator Dense Table Controls
patterns.description: Search, filter, sort, and bulk actions are grouped for repeated operational use.

patterns.title: Restrained Accent Usage
patterns.description: Accent color or emphasis is reserved for navigation landmarks, status, or primary actions.

patterns.title: Warm Muted Surface Palette
patterns.description: Base surfaces, dividers, and fills lean warm and low-saturation rather than cool grayscale or bright brand color blocks.

patterns.title: Editorial Group Spacing
patterns.description: Whitespace is used to separate meaningful groups and set rhythm, while preserving practical density inside groups.

patterns.title: Quiet Material Treatment
patterns.description: Borders, fills, shadows, and radius are understated and consistent, with tactile feel achieved through restraint rather than decorative layering.
